zh.lifeSummary: 當John WORTLEY於1358年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾沃特利時，他的父親Nicholas De Wortley20歲，母親Katherine De Lizours19歲。他於1377年與Elizabeth de la Hay在英國英格蘭越可爾沃特利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1436年9月3日享年78歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾海姆斯沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John WORTLEY于1358年出生在英国英格兰越可爾沃特利时，他的父亲Nicholas De Wortley20岁，母亲Katherine De Lizours19岁。他于1377年与Elizabeth de la Hay在英国英格兰越可爾沃特利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1436年9月3日享年78岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾海姆斯沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: WORTLEY
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Wortley in Tankersley (Yorkshire), or Lower, Upper, or New Wortley in Armley (Yorkshire), or (least likely) Wortley in Wotton under Edge (Gloucestershire). The place in Tankersley derives from Old English wyrt ‘plant, vegetable’ + lēah ‘wood, woodland clearing’. The place in Armley derives from an Old English personal name Wyrca or Weorca + Old English lēah. The Gloucestershire placename derives from Old English wyrt + lēah.

variants.name: Worley
meanings: habitational name with different origins. In the West Midlands this surname is most probably derived from Great or Little Wyrley in Norton Canes (Staffordshire). The placenames derive from Old English wīr ‘bog myrtle’ + lēah ‘wood, woodland clearing’. In the East Midlands, the name is possibly from Worlick in Ramsey (Huntingdonshire), the etymology of the which is uncertain. In northern England, possibly from Whirley in Over Alderley (Cheshire), which has the same etymology as the Staffordshire names. There may also be a further unlocated source of this habitational name in southern England.
possibly an irregular variant of   Wortley   or   Warley  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John WORTLEY was born in 1358, in Wortley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nicholas De Wortley, was 20 and his mother, Katherine De Lizours, was 19. He married Elizabeth de la Hay in 1377, in Wortley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 3 September 1436, at the age of 78, and was buried in Hemsworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John WORTLEY est né en 1358, à Wortley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas De Wortley, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Katherine De Lizours, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de la Hay en 1377, à Wortley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 3 septembre 1436, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Hemsworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John WORTLEY 1358 in Wortley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas De Wortley 20 und seine Mutter Katherine De Lizours 19. Er hat 1377 in Wortley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth de la Hay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 3. September 1436 im Alter von 78 Jahren und wurde in Hemsworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John WORTLEY è nato il nel 1358 nel Wortley, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Nicholas De Wortley, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Katherine De Lizours, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de la Hay nel 1377, nel Wortley, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 3 settembre 1436, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Hemsworth, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John WORTLEYが1358年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアウオルトリーで生まれた時，父Nicholas De Wortleyは20歳，母Katherine De Lizoursは19歳であった。1377年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアウオルトリーでElizabeth de la Hayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1436年9月3日に78歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヘムスウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John WORTLEY(이)가 1358년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 워틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas De Wortley(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine De Lizours(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1377년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 워틀리에서 Elizabeth de la Hay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1436년 9월 3일 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 헤스워스에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de la Hay em 1377, em Wortley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 3 de setembro de 1436, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Hemsworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John WORTLEY родился в 1358 г. в местности вортли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nicholas De Wortley было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine De Lizours, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de la Hay в 1377 г. в местности вортли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 3 сентября 1436 г. в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности хемсворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John WORTLEY nació en 1358, en Wortley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Nicholas De Wortley, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Katherine De Lizours, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de la Hay en 1377, en Wortley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 3 de septiembre de 1436, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Hemsworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
